rationale.R1.2: A general request to look at a research paragraph centrally includes checking whether the argument and causal transitions cohere.
rationale.R1.6: Because the object is a paragraph, sentence-level clarity, flow, register, and concision are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must disclose uncertainty caused by the underspecified delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inflating the request into stronger review duties than the delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within responsibility projection and not perform the requested paragraph review.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling unsupported scientific or market claims to pass as verified.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact’s research-writing content.
